# QSES — Quant Statistical Edge System
# Generated by scanning all import statements in the codebase (Faz 6 EK).
# Pin exact versions after your first successful `pytest tests/ -v` run
# locally, per EK-9 (Reproducibility) — this file lists minimum versions only.

numpy>=1.26
pandas>=2.1
yfinance>=0.2.40      # data/fetcher.py -- lazy-imported, only required at fetch time
plotly>=5.20          # reporting/reporter.py -- lazy-imported, only required for HTML/chart output
joblib>=1.3           # engine.py -- parallel backtest execution across combinations
pytest>=8.0           # tests/
